creator: pkubaj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 192048
shar

This shar includes the port for Return to the Roots. This is an open-source implementation of The Settlers 2: Gold Edition video engine, similar to OpenMW or OpenRCT2. You need original game files to play this.

It builds on 10.4-RELEASE in Poudriere. I have also tested it my playing about 15 minutes on my CURRENT (installed from ports tree).
